instruction: The office tower looks shrunken and too heavy. Restore its normal size and outline balance.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/building-office-2.svg" transform="translate(33, 33) scale(2.5833)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 21h19.5m-18-18v18m10.5-18v18m6-13.5V21M6.75 6.75h.75m-.75 3h.75m-.75 3h.75m3-6h.75m-.75 3h.75m-.75 3h.75M6.75 21v-3.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125V21M3 3h12m-.75 4.5H21m-3.75 3.75h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm0 3h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm0 3h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
